chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl. No.2075 of 2024 21.10.2024 Khawaja Muhammad Azeem, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl. P.G. a/w SI Qurban Ali P.S. Sohrab Goth. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Asif Khan is seeking post arrest bail in Crime No.231/2024 U/s 395 PPC of P.S. Sohrab Goth, Karachi. 2. As per FIR, applicant was apprehended alongwith co-accused while committing robbery from complainant on 04.05.2024 at 0230 hours near service road towards Jamali bridge, Sohrab Goth, Shell Petrol Pump, Scheme 33, Karachi by the Rangers and police, who were attracted at the spat at the time when this offence was committed by the applicant and others. 3. Learned counsel for applicant says that applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated in this case; the prosecution story does not appeal to the common sense. However, his arguments have been rebutted by the learned Addl. P.G as well as complainant present in the court. 4. I have heard the parties and perused material available on record. The applicant was arrested on the spot by the police and Rangers apparently with whom he has no enmity to falsely implicate him in this case. From his personal search, an unlicensed pistol was recovered and robbed articles from co-accused, who was also apprehended with him at the spot. No case for indulgence is made out. This bail application is dismissed. The trial court, however, is directed to expedite the trial and examine material witnesses within three months, after which the applicant would be at liberty to repeat his bail application which shall be decided on its own merits. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial.

The trial court, however, is directed to expedite the trial and examine material witnesses within three months, after which the applicant would be at liberty to repeat his bail application which shall be decided on its own merits. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The bail application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
